// XenologySettings: Documentation keys (//) precede each setting block.
// EnableXenology: Master switch for kill tracking, xXP, hunt, and combat hooks.
// BottomTenPopularityMultiplier: Kill credit and kill-XP multiplier for globally least-killed species (bottom 10).
// HuntUseClockSchedule: Fixed UTC hunt slots (default: :00, :20, :40 for 15m each = 3 hunts/hour). Set false for HuntIntervalHours rotation.
// HuntSlotStartMinutes: UTC minute-of-hour each hunt starts (three windows per hour with gaps).
// HuntIntervalHours: Hours between hunt rotations when HuntUseClockSchedule is false.
// HuntGrantLootTableRolls: End-of-hunt loot from SharedLoot LootConfig (same pool as Loremaster repeat-loot).
// HuntRewardRollsFirstPlace: Random loot rolls for 1st / 2nd / 3rd; 4+ need HuntRewardParticipationMinPoints hunt xXP for remaining roll(s).
// HuntGrantPlacementCharacterXp: Grant ACE character XP at hunt end = fraction × XP to next level (Loremaster-style basis).
// HuntPlacementXpFractionFirst: 1.5 = 150% of XP to next level for 1st; 1.0 = 100% 2nd; 0.5 = 50% 3rd; 0.2 = 20% rest.
// BaseXenologyXpPerKill: Base xXP (1 = one unit before multipliers) before popularity, hunt, streak, and rarity.
// UseMilestoneXpForTiers: Loot tier milestones track Total xXP (linear with multipliers) instead of raw kill count.
// MilestoneXpTier1: xXP thresholds for loot tier +1 / +2 / +3 (same scale as old kill milestones if BaseXenologyXpPerKill is 1 and no mults).
// RarityGlobalKillsThreshold: Shard-wide species kills below this get RarityXpMultiplier (helps low-spawn / under-hunted species). 0 = off.
// RarityXpMultiplier: xXP multiplier when species is rare on the shard (stacks with bottom-ten and hunt).
// DamageBonusUsesXenologyXp: Damage bonus from TotalXenologyXp instead of kill count.
// DamageBonusPerWeightedKill: When DamageBonusUsesXenologyXp is false: percent per lifetime kill.
// DamageBonusCapPercent: Maximum outgoing damage bonus percent from Xenology.
// DebounceSaveMilliseconds: Minimum delay between global species JSON flush to disk.
// DenylistWcids: Species excluded from hunt selection / ranking.
